text: Where do you guys want to go for lunch?
We have a lot of options.
I haven't eaten yet today, and I'm really hungry.
What would be the fastest?
Fast food burgers would be the fastest, but also the unhealthiest.
Fast food would also be the most convenient.
That's true, but what's more important?
The most convenient or the most flavorful?
The most convenient.
I need food now.
Okay, okay.
If you're that hungry, you probably also want the most filling.
Yes, the fastest and the most filling.
Where can I find that?
The most filling would probably be sushi.
I don't need to eat very much to be totally satisfied.
Sushi is also the most expensive, and I don't get paid until Friday.
What's the cheapest option?
Pizza is usually the cheapest, plus you can get a lot for your money.
The pizzas here are huge, the biggest I've ever had.
The biggest?
Perfect.
The cheapest, the biggest, and the greasiest.
No thanks.
Why don't we try something different?
This Indian restaurant has the most unique menu for sure, and the spiciest.
My tongue won't survive it.
What about a nice salad then?
It's the least spicy, the lightest, and also the healthiest.
And the most boring.
What about tacos?
This is the most popular taco restaurant in the area, and look, it's the least busy at the moment.
Great.
They will be the quickest to bring our food out.
They won't have the best variety though, they only serve tacos, no burritos or quesadillas.
And no dessert.
They have the best service around, the friendliest and the fastest.
Sounds good to me.
Do we all agree?
Tacos will be healthy, but not the most nutritious.
They'll be delicious, but not the most exotic.
They will be affordable, but not the cheapest.
But they are definitely the fastest.
